transcript.text:
[I called earlier today for an order of the biggest size]
[What is it?]
[Roasted Leg of Lamb]
[Try if you dare]
This has got to be the biggest lamb leg
This is no joke
[Let's cut some pieces out too]
[With BBQ sauce on top]
Hello everyone
I'm near Konkuk University
This is called the Lamb Skewer Street
This place serves mutton leg bbq
And is served as a whole
I called in earlier to save the biggest one for me
Let's go
[Dae Heung Yangdari BBQ] [Konkuk University Location]

[Hello]
The smell of lamb is strong here
-Excuse me -Yes, hello
Hello
I called earlier today for an order of the biggest size
How much does it weigh?
Over 2kgs
Is it possible?
That can usually serve about 4 people
It might not be enough for me then
[Say what?]
I'll give you more food if that doesn't fill you up
[Super-size lamb leg just for Tzuyang]
[Let's see it]
[A special large]
[Mouthwatering visuals...]

Thank you
Skewers would be good here too
So big
We roast it inside first
You can have fun by slicing your own pieces
And upon request, we will debone everything in the kitchen
Lamb dumplings and lamb soup on the house
Thank you
I can cut out the cooked pieces right now
But I want to try it as a whole
Just like this
Have to do something like this since it's a mukbang
I've had all kinda of legs before like turkey But this is really big
[Happy]
No gamey taste
Delicious

This is no joke
I almost ate the raw part
Cut it
And cook
He said I can eat it like beef
So I guess some red is okay?
Wow, cuts like butter
So soft
I really like the cumin powder
Dip some
So good
Slice it like this
It's fun eating it like this
Like kebab
Dip
Cut one

It's so juicy And also,
Some parts have texture and some parts are very tender
Would you like me to show you?
You have to cook it on the grill
I can eat it from that?
It's not cooked all the way
I can't eat it rare?
[Nope!]
[You will get a bellyache...]
Another important thing
You must put this on
[BBQ sauce...!]
[Even the ones on the grill too]
Thank you I didn't know
Sauce on here too
The lamb dumplings I got on the house

First time trying it
I know what this is
This is like a sample so that I can order more of it
It's so good
Half meat, half meat juice
So much juice, just like Xiao Long Bao
This is no joke
Dip like this with onions
I'm good with veggies these days
Delicious
Cut some over here
And over here...
Sauce
Eat this with this
It's sweet
Was this lamb soup? Wow, a lot of meat

Lamb meat stew?
Interesting!
Definitely different than bone broth
The taste is good, and it's also fun to eat
[Feels like she's taking too long to cut the meat...]
-Here, let me help you -Thank you
This part
That's a lot
Some sauce on here again
Ziran is too strong Cumin is almost feels like Ramyun seasoning powder
Onion on top
Cumin too
Yummy
[Fried lamb on the house]
I'll pay for this one
Just promote our restaurant

These are huge
I've never had fried lamb before
It's so good
The meat is more tender than pork
Not dry, it's so soft
It's hot
I thought lamb meat was more tough
But it's so soft
The batter is thick, so it tastes better
I've just been sold
[You want to come back here, right?]
[Sold]
Some lamb leg too
Dip it
Take this On top
I feel like a kebab man

Let's get all the meat
Lay this down like this
The leg part
This part too
[Cuts with ease]
I got the whole thing
[Sauce too]
I thought dumplings were only good when they're hot
They're good at any temperature
Let's try the leg part This over here
This might be more tough to chew
Nevermind
It's chewy
Some of this too (coconut juice)
That's really good
With cumin

I've reached the metal
What if this falls off?
A lot too
This is cooked really well
Mostly bones now
[Sauce on the bones too]
You're doing a great job
It tastes so good
1 order of dumplings, please
[A successful business tactic]
Thank you That was quick
These dumplings are so good
I can eat 100 plates of it
This whole leg is 80,000 Won (~$62 USD)
The price is very reasonable
I thought it would be over 100,000 Won

And it tastes good
Kaoliang liquor would be so nice right now
[I'll see you next time]
Meat juice
The place will get crowded at 6pm So I need to hurry
I can take this out, but I'm a little scared that it will fall out
Excuse me
-Need me to take it out? -Yes, I feel like it will fall
Good job
Thank you
Get these over here
I used the whole container of sauce
Personally, I prefer Guo Bao Rou over Tangsuyuk (different style of fried food)
Let's try this
This is even more tender
Let's cut it

Not cooked all the way
[All ready now]
[Getting all the meat out]
Thank you
Feels different than eating lamb skewers
I like eating lamb skewers, but
These are more fun to eat
And less gamey taste on these
The skewers have a lot of the lamb taste
These are much less
All parts of the meat are different Some are tender, some are chewy, some are tough
[You eat a lot...]
It's almost gone already
A lot of fried lamb left though
These stay so fresh and crispy even after they've been sitting here
When will I be able to eat this again?

I thought it was going to be weird at first
It's not like that at all
Are you going to need more food?
I'm still a little hungry
She said that was enough
1 last bite
Thanks everyone [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
